question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/controller/TopicController.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: getTopic()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit a network partition that causes intermittent database connectivity to receive a 200 response with a partially-null Topic object from topicMapper.map() when one of the three service calls returns null instead of throwing, leading to clients caching a corrupt topic representation?
